ddls:
CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Voter's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Voter's last name */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address of the voter */,
  "apt" TEXT /* Apartment or unit number */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code */,
  "precinct_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the voting precinct */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Voter's phone number for contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Voter's email for digital communications */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Voter's date of birth for age verification */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the voter registered */,
  "voter_status" TEXT /* Current status of the voter (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the precinct */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the precinct */,
  "resources" TEXT /* Available resources at the precinct */,
  "polling_hours" TEXT /* Hours the polling place is open */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the precinct */,
  "accessibility_features" TEXT /* Accessibility features available */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates for mapping */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the precinct information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "precinct_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the voting precinct */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., general, primary, special) */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for early voting */,
  "absentee_ballot_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for absentee ballots */,
  "result_announcement_date" TEXT /* Date when the election results will be announced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turnout record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the election */,
  "precinct_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the voting precinct */,
  "voter_count" INTEGER /* Number of voters who turned out */,
  "early_voting_count" INTEGER /* Number of early voters */,
  "absentee_voting_count" INTEGER /* Number of absentee voters */,
  "percentage_turnout" TEXT /* Turnout percentage */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the turnout data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "precinct_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the voting precinct */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., voting booths, ballots) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., available, in use, out of service) */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Last inspection date for the resource */,
  "next_inspection_due" TEXT /* Next inspection due date for the resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the resource information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "precinct_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the voting precinct */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Volunteer's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Volunteer's last name */,
  "role" TEXT /* Volunteer's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Volunteer's phone number for contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Volunteer's email for digital communications */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Volunteer's availability during the election */,
  "training_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the volunteer has completed necessary training */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the volunteer information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volunteers_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electionOfficials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "precinct_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the voting precinct */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Official's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Official's last name */,
  "title" TEXT /* Official's title */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Official's phone number for contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Official's email for digital communications */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the official started their role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the official's term ends */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the official information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electionOfficials_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id")
)
